name: Banner
description: Full-width notification banner for important announcements. Supports 6 status types, bold/subtle emphasis, and optional action button.

emphasis.description: Bold uses solid background with white text; subtle uses light tinted background

icon.description: Optional leading icon (defaults to info icon)

onButtonClick.description: Called when the action button is clicked

onDismiss.description: Called when the close button is clicked

examples.title: Information Banner
examples.code:
<Banner
  status="information"
  title="New feature available"
  description="Check out our latest update."
  buttonLabel="Learn more"
  onButtonClick={() => navigate('/features')}
/>

examples.title: Bold Success Banner
examples.code:
<Banner
  status="success"
  emphasis="bold"
  title="Payment successful!"
  description="Your order has been confirmed."
/>

examples.title: Error Banner with Dismiss
examples.code:
<Banner
  status="error"
  title="Connection lost"
  description="Please check your internet connection."
  dismissible
  onDismiss={() => setShowBanner(false)}
/>

examples.title: Small Warning Banner
examples.code:
<Banner
  status="warning"
  size="sm"
  title="Your subscription expires soon"
  buttonLabel="Renew"
  onButtonClick={handleRenew}
/>

examples.title: Feature Announcement
examples.code:
<Banner
  status="feature"
  emphasis="bold"
  title="Introducing Dark Mode"
  description="Now available in settings."
  icon="moon"
/>

examples.title: Opportunity Banner
examples.code:
<Banner
  status="opportunity"
  title="Limited time offer"
  description="Get 50% off annual plans."
  buttonLabel="Upgrade now"
  onButtonClick={handleUpgrade}
/>
